assignment.objective: Build the smallest keyboard-operable static viewer over the validated authored GGUF-loading trace.
assignment.selected_reason: TRACE-02 had passed source-anchor and replay validation, so the narrow viewer dependency was satisfied.

decisions: Independent technical review and a fair static-source baseline remain required before educational-effectiveness claims.

claims.label: Verified
claims.statement: The static viewer builds deterministically and exposes bounded keyboard navigation plus a transcript fallback.

claims.label: Open Question
claims.statement: The viewer has not yet been shown to improve code tracing over an information-equivalent static baseline.
